spec.name: A Shaded Path Through The Forest
spec.description: You are at a turn on a small shadowed path leading through the forest. The forest seems to become lighter to the west. The path continues north and west.

north.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

west.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The shadowy path is probably used by the small animals living in the forest.
The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination. A large branch looms above you, over the path.
